name: memory-claw
description: 100% autonomous multilingual OpenClaw plugin for memory capture and recall via LanceDB + Mistral Embeddings. v2.4.38: CRITICAL FIX - Added convertJsonlToMessages() to transform session file format. Polling now correctly extracts user messages from JSONL, cleans preamble metadata, filters for role=user/human, and converts content arrays to text.
author: duan78
